channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Senate Begins Impeachment Proceedings Against Vice President Sara Duterte
item.description: On May 18, 2026, the Philippine Senate officially convened as an impeachment court to begin the trial of Vice President Sara Duterte. She faces allegations including culpable violation of the 1987 Con...

item.title: Journalist notes unusual redaction of Trump's image in released Epstein files
item.description: The Justice Department (DOJ) came under criticism earlier in 2026 for mishandling the release of files related to Jeffrey Epstein, particularly for improperly redacting or failing to redact sensitive ...

item.title: LetinAR Develops Advanced Optical Modules for Wearable AI Glasses
item.description: South Korean startup LetinAR is pioneering the development of optical modules for AI-enabled smart glasses, a key component that determines usability, image clarity, and power efficiency. Founded in 2...

item.title: CRDB Shareholders Support CEO Continuity Due to Strong Performance
item.description: Shareholders of CRDB Bank Plc don show say dem wan the current Group CEO, Abdulmajid Nsekela, to continue leading the bank even after the 10-year legal term don expire. During the 31st Annual General ...

item.title: Senate convenes as impeachment court for Vice President Sara Duterte, Cayetano remains Senate President
item.description: On May 18, 2026, the Philippine Senate formally convened as an impeachment court to begin proceedings against Vice President Sara Duterte. Despite speculations and political tension in the hours leadi...

item.title: London Underground drivers to strike over four-day week, causing widespread travel disruption
item.description: London Underground drivers, represented by the Rail, Maritime and Transport (RMT) union, will commence strike action this week in opposition to a proposed four-day working week, despite Transport for ...

item.title: AI Advances in Early Cancer Detection Using Multimodal Models
item.description: Recent reporting highlights the growing role of artificial intelligence (AI) in cancer detection and diagnosis. According to the Daily Caller News Foundation, AI tools like GPT-4 are showing potential...

item.title: KSE-100 Index Drops Over 2,500 Points Amid Ongoing Bearish Trend at PSX
item.description: The Pakistan Stock Exchange witnessed significant bearish momentum on Monday as the benchmark KSE-100 index plunged by more than 2,500 points during intraday trading. According to the latest updates, ...

item.title: PenCom launches PenCare to give free healthcare to pensioners earning below ₦70,000
item.description: The National Pension Commission (PenCom) don start one new healthcare scheme wey dem call PenCare for Nigerian pensioners wey dey earn below ₦70,000 per month. This programme na pilot project wey go c...

item.title: Global Companies Face Over $25 Billion Losses Due to US-Israel Conflict with Iran
item.description: The ongoing US-Israeli conflict with Iran has already caused significant financial losses for businesses worldwide, estimated at more than $25 billion and still growing. A Reuters analysis of statemen...

item.title: Impact of Reform UK on Ethnic Minorities and Local Communities
item.description: The recent local elections in the UK, which saw significant gains for Reform UK, have raised serious concerns about the treatment of ethnic minorities and immigrants. Reform candidates and representat...

item.title: US Lawmaker Praises Trump for Strike on ISIS Leader in Nigeria, Warns Against Attacks on Christians
item.description: US congressman Riley Moore don give kudos to former President Donald Trump as e order di joint Nigerian-American operation wey kill Abu-Bilal al-Minuki, wey be number two for ISIS global ranking. Moor...

item.title: Joe Rogan expresses concern over Theo Von's mental health; Von denies issues on social media
item.description: In a recent episode of The Joe Rogan Experience, comedian and podcaster Joe Rogan expressed serious concerns about the mental health of fellow comedian and podcaster Theo Von. Rogan highlighted Von's ...

item.title: Dangote Plans Refinery and Fertiliser Investments in Tanzania and East Africa
item.description: Dar es Salaam — Aliko Dangote, Africa's richest man, met with President Samia Suluhu Hassan on May 16, 2026, at the State House in Dar es Salaam to discuss expanding his investments in East Africa. Th...

item.title: Heavy Rain Hits Brisbane, Roads and Trains Disrupted Before Cooler Weather Arrives
item.description: Brisbane is experiencing unseasonal heavy rain, causing significant disruption to both the city’s train network and roadways. Flash flooding between South Bank and South Brisbane stations led to signa...

item.title: John Mbadi Defends Kenya's Fuel Prices Amid Comparisons with Neighbouring Countries
item.description: Nairobi – Treasury Cabinet Secretary John Mbadi has responded to the recent rise in fuel prices in Kenya, linking the increase to the global effects of the Gulf War between the US and Iran. The Energy...

item.title: László Nemes discusses antisemitism, Holocaust memory, and challenges in the film industry
item.description: Hungarian director László Nemes, renowned for his award-winning Holocaust film Son of Saul, has returned with his new drama Orphan and a Jean Moulin biopic, Moulin, premiering at Cannes. In a candid i...

item.title: Senate Prepares to Hear Sara Duterte Impeachment Case Amid Leadership Uncertainty
item.description: The Senate of the Philippines is set to convene as an impeachment court on Monday, May 18, 2026, to hear the highly anticipated case of Vice President Sara Duterte. This trial is being closely monitor...

item.title: Labor confronts voter scepticism over challenging federal budget
item.description: Following the recent federal budget, Labor faces a tough challenge in persuading voters of its merits. Post-budget polling suggests that many Australians view it as one of the worst in decades, with c...

item.title: Yobe APC governorship aspirants insist on primaries, reject consensus choice
item.description: Three Yobe APC governorship aspirants, namely Mustapha Maihaja, Bashir Machina, and Kashim Tumsah, don reject the emergence of Baba Malam Wali as the party's consensus candidate. The trio, who are col...
